title: Infosys Recognized by Whitelane Research for Cloud & Infrastructure Services in UK & Ireland
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Whitelane Research ranked it number one in Cloud & Infrastructure Services in the 2025 UK & Ireland IT Sourcing Study. The report also named Infosys an "Exceptional Performer" for the second consecutive year, citing an 80% client satisfaction score in the category and broader above-market satisfaction scores.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as the number one service provider in Cloud & Infrastructure Services across the United Kingdom and Ireland in the Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025 UK & Ireland.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as Number One Service Provider in Cloud & Infrastructure Services in the Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025 UK & Ireland

key_facts.fact: The report ranked Infosys as an 'Exceptional Performer' for the second consecutive year.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as Number One Service Provider in Cloud & Infrastructure Services in the Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025 UK & Ireland

key_facts.fact: Infosys achieved an 80% client satisfaction score in Cloud & Infrastructure Services, and its overall satisfaction scores were 6% higher than the market average (74%) in cloud & infrastructure services and 7% above the general satisfaction ranking.
